negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_ed7a0ed5-76e6-4e97-95f3-9078d4200cc4
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a car, looking out onto a quiet suburban street under a bright blue sky dotted with scattered clouds. The road is lined with lush green trees and houses with various colored roofs, including red and beige. Several cars are parked along the sides of the street, including a white sedan on the left and a cream SUV on the right. As the video progresses, the white sedan moves forward, indicating that the car with the camera is moving away from it. The SUV remains stationary throughout the sequence, behind which the ego vehicle is doing parallel parking. The trees sway slightly, suggesting a gentle breeze, and the overall scene remains calm and residential. By the final frame, the white sedan appears smaller, while the SUV stays put. A wide-angle shot captures the entire street and surrounding environment.
